wc26.title: FIFA World Cup 2026
wc26.infoTooltip:
Canada · Mexico · USA — 104 matches in total. Kick-off times are shown in Berlin (UTC+2). The match schedule is taken from the official FIFA website: fifa.com.

Group stage betting rules:
• Each round is split into slots in chronological order by time.
• Rounds 1 and 2: 6 slots of 4 matches — 2 bets for each slot.
• Round 3: 4 slots of 6 matches — 3 bets per slot.

From the knockout stage onwards, bets must be submitted for each match.
wc26.quickLinkHint: All matches · date & time · FIFA flags

betSlots.hint: Group stage: pick matches to bet on in each slot. Rounds 1–2: 2 bets from 4 matches; round 3: 3 bets from 6. Times in Berlin (UTC+2).
betSlots.loginRequired: Bets are available only to participants registered for the tournament.
